**Why:** a test polluted real home this way and took down the user's other live session (P0).
**How to apply:** sandbox `herdres.claude_settings_path` (onto a tmp path) in any test exercising
the update/apply path; keep `decision_hook_command()` deriving from `INSTALL_BIN_DIR` so a patched
bin dir can't leak into the real one; after a suite run, assert real settings.json is byte-identical
(md5 before/after). Coexistence ground truth in [[herdres-canary-and-state-ops]]; the hook's
producer→consumer contract is [[herdres-streaming-drafts-disabled]]-adjacent in TURN_FEED.md.
